name: Short Confirmations

chat_history.message: Okay, racking at forty feet gives you a lot more usable space...
No no no, I'm not saying forty feet. We stack the pallets forty high — two stacks of twenty. It's twenty pallets in a stack, and we put one on top of the other, so that's forty pallets high.

success_condition: The agent confirms the correction in 5 words or less without parroting back everything the user said. The agent should quickly acknowledge and move forward.

success_examples.response: Got it, 40 pallets high. So at that stack height, you'd need about...
Right, 40 pallets high. Let me recalculate the floor space.

failure_examples.response: Okay... got it. You're talking about stacking loose pallets 40 high — two stacks of twenty — not forty feet of racking. Do you want me to use that 40-high stacking assumption?
I understand. So you're not using forty feet of racking, you're stacking pallets twenty high and then putting another stack of twenty on top, giving you forty pallets in each column.
